issues.description: Condition should be 'HasCardOnBoard' with count ≤1 to represent '1 or less cards in hand', not 'Always'. The power boost is conditional on hand size.
Trigger should be 'StartOfTurn' or a continuous check, not 'OnPlay'. This is a static ability that should apply whenever the condition is met during the game, not just on play.
Blocker keyword is missing from DSL. The [Blocker] ability should be represented (though it may be a keyword applied via 'GiveKeyword' action or card trait, depending on DSL structure).
